task: place the yellow cup in the oven
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A yellow cup is on a wooden table, with an oven visible in the background. The cup is rigid and has a body. The oven has an open door. STRATEGY - First, reach and grasp the yellow cup. Then, transport it to the oven. Finally, place the cup inside the oven. Failure modes include dropping the cup during transport or misaligning it with the oven's interior. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the cup at its body; Step 2 grasp the cup for secure hold; Step 3 transport the cup to the oven; Step 4 place the cup inside the oven.

Goal: inside(yellow_cup, oven)
Scene: yellow_cup, oven, table
Step 1: reach(yellow_cup)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow cup
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_cup, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_cup) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(yellow_cup)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow cup
  contact: holding(yellow_cup) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_cup)
Step 3: transport(yellow_cup -> oven)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the oven
  spatial: above(yellow_cup, oven, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_cup)
  done_when: above(yellow_cup, oven, 0.05)
Step 4: place(yellow_cup -> oven)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the oven
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_cup, oven) [completion]; released(yellow_cup) [completion]
  pose: inside(yellow_cup, oven) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_cup, oven) AND released(yellow_cup)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow cup
the body of the yellow cup
an empty area inside the oven
an empty area inside the oven
